case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO VS. ALEJANDRO SANCHEZ CARDONA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND.MULTIPLE ATTEMPTS WERE MADE ON VARIOUS DATES AT VARIOUS TIMES WITH NO SUCCESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO AS TO DEFENDANT CARDONA, ALEJANDRO SANCHEZ

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARDONA, ALEJANDRO SANCHEZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $215.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,715.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
TRIAL RESET TO APR-08-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-05-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CARDONA, ALEJANDRO SANCHEZ
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,937.90 AS TO DEFENDANT CARDONA, ALEJANDRO SANCHEZ
